name: dt-style-guide
description: Dynatrace corporate style guide — vendored terminology, trademarks, voice/tone, grammar, and formatting rules with a dt-style-checker sub-agent, a dt-doc-fixer sub-agent, a dt-style-rules skill, three orchestrator commands (dt-style-refresh, dt-review-pr, dt-review-docs), and vendored reference docs. Acts as a fallback for dev-workflows when no repo-configured prose linter (Vale) is available.
